name: aitokenweight Daily Token Poster
description: ANP-facing entrypoint for a skill that collects daily AI token usage, normalizes it, and renders an aitokenweight share poster. ANP provides discovery, identity, capability description, and invocation metadata; token collection and image rendering are application-level skill actions.

Infomations.description: Public source repository and cloneable visual template implementation.
Raw discovery document for agents that consume the skill directly from GitHub.
Agent Skill URL manifest for the Daily Token Poster capability.
Prompt that requires exact current token usage evidence and forbids demo/default usage values.
Raw GitHub prompt URL for remote agents that cannot resolve relative .well-known paths.
DailyTokenUsage JSON schema consumed by the poster renderer.
DailyTokenPosterResult JSON schema returned by renderPoster.

interfaces.description: MCP-compatible structured actions for collectUsage and renderPoster.

x-aitokenweight.proofNote: Add a DID proof before treating this as production identity verification evidence.
